title: pyrethrum sibiricum
intro: Pyrethrum sibiricum is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family, native to Siberia and the Himalayas, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains pyrethrin, a natural insecticide used to repel mosquitoes and other insects, as well as flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum sibiricum include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum sibiricum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support immune function and overall health, as well as provide relief from respiratory issues and allergies.
